cross_scene_arcs.title: Romantic Relationship with Roberta
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Brian initiates a romantic involvement with Roberta, sets non-marriage expectations, experiences conflicts over commitment, leading to a breakup and later a friendly reunion.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Initiates physical intimacy and challenges Roberta's identity tied to her marriage.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Re-established friendly contact after her career success.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Lingering tension from past commitment conflicts and emotional hurt.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Supportive yet Critical Engagement
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Brian offers practical support to Roberta, such as job connections, but also questions her life decisions and defends her choices to her family, reflecting a pattern of engaged but critical involvement.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Offers to connect Roberta with a teaching job contingent on relocation.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Integrated into Roberta's family circle while maintaining a critical stance on her choices.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: The ongoing balance between support and criticism in their interactions.

cross_scene_arcs.title: From Child Violinist to Professional Cellist
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Nick progresses from playing violin as a child to performing at Carnegie Hall and becoming a professional cellist in a graduate program.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Violinist since age three, part of a performance to help his mother secure a teaching job.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Professional cellist in a graduate music program.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Coping with Parental Divorce and Reassurance
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Nick observes his parents' divorce, learns about his father's abandonment, bonds with Brian, expresses anger and fear, but is reassured by Roberta.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Observing family conflict and emotional breakdown after divorce announcement.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Comforted by Roberta with understanding of family situation, but fearful that Brian might leave.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Fear that Brian will leave like his father did.

cross_scene_arcs.title: School Fight and Suspension
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Nick gets into a physical fight at school, resulting in injury and suspension, with a warning of expulsion for future incidents.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Engaged in a fight with another boy, nose bleeding.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Suspended for two days and under threat of expulsion.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Nick's behavioral problems and the need for help, as indicated by school authority.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Taking on Protective Roles and Challenging Authority
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Nick offers to handle risky tasks and challenges Roberta's decisions, showing a shift from passive observer to active participant in family matters.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Shows willingness to take on protective role by offering to handle a retrieval.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Actively challenges Roberta about job loss and safety, prompting her to explain motivations.

cross_scene_arcs.title: From Betrayal to Single Motherhood
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Roberta moves from emotional withdrawal after discovering her husband's betrayal to accepting her role as a single mother.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Emotionally withdrawn in bed after destroying a photo of her husband with another woman.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Affirming her intent to live alone with her sons in a rundown apartment.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Ongoing emotional adjustment and healing from marital trauma.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Path to Teaching Success
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Roberta transitions from considering a teaching opportunity to establishing herself as a violin teacher, achieving classroom control and student success.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Discussing career setbacks and a potential teaching job with Brian.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Celebrating a student's acceptance to Juilliard, indicating teaching effectiveness.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Continued challenges in securing permanent teaching positions and resources.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Saving the Violin Program
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Roberta fights against the defunding of her violin program, from initial confrontation to public advocacy and a triumphant performance.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Learning the violin program is eliminated and her job is terminated.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Delivering a speech at Carnegie Hall advocating for arts education after a successful concert.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Whether the advocacy will lead to long-term program preservation.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Bonding with Students
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Roberta's relationship with students evolves from classroom conflict to collaborative mentorship and celebration of achievements.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Confronting defiant students and establishing authority in a chaotic class.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Reuniting with alumni for a demanding concert rehearsal, showing positive ongoing bonds.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Maintaining student engagement and overcoming resistance in future interactions.
